title: Junior SEO Specialist at ID Fresh Food

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at ID Fresh Food
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, ID Fresh Food in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!
